title: Cost Efficiency & Value Chain comparison: SMRs vs. Large Reactors
text:
Energize Your Strategy with Nuclear-Driven Clean Power
Founder
Power Generation Integrated was established to deliver practical, scalable decarbonization solutions, with a focus on the role of nuclear energy in achieving reliable, low-carbon outcomes.
With over three decades of experience across nuclear energy, power generation, and complex infrastructure, I have held leadership and technical roles with organizations including Ontario Power Generation, Bruce Power, BWXT, Kairos Power, and Nuclear Power Corporation of India Limited.
This experience enables a disciplined, systems-level approach—integrating nuclear technologies with broader energy strategies to deliver actionable, high-impact results for clients.
Capabilities
Power Generation Integrated provides specialized consulting across R&D, engineering, strategy, and technical evaluation, with a focus on decarbonization and nuclear energy applications.
Drawing on deep, hands-on experience, each engagement is tailored to the client’s specific objectives—delivering integrated, practical solutions that bridge technology, operations, and long-term strategy.
Approach
At Power Generation Integrated, each engagement is built on close collaboration and a clear understanding of the client’s objectives, constraints, and operating environment.
The approach is disciplined and results-oriented—combining technical depth with practical execution to develop solutions that are tailored, transparent, and aligned with long-term success.
NuFusion
Focused on the integration of advanced nuclear systems, NuFusion brings together proven and emerging technologies to support reliable, low-carbon energy solutions.
This includes experience across conventional nuclear generation, next-generation reactor designs, and fusion developments, as well as the integration of cogeneration and hybrid energy systems.
The objective is to deliver practical pathways that combine nuclear with complementary energy and storage solutions for long-term resilience.
EcoTech
EcoTech addresses the broader decarbonization landscape through a structured, systems-level approach.
This includes renewable energy, carbon capture, hydrogen, sustainable fuels, and energy storage—integrated into tailored strategies that reflect each client’s operational and market realities.
The focus is on identifying viable, scalable solutions that deliver measurable impact while maintaining economic discipline.
Intelligence
Intelligence
Intelligence focuses on enhancing decision-making, performance, and reliability across complex energy systems through advanced digital and analytical capabilities.
Leveraging data-driven approaches—including advanced analytics, AI/ML, IoT, and digital engineering—this capability supports the design, optimization, and lifecycle management of infrastructure.
The objective is to enable more informed, timely decisions and deliver measurable improvements in system efficiency and operational outcomes.
